title: Remove Gallery section

requirements.text: Remove the Gallery section from the landing page. This includes removing the GallerySection component from App.tsx and deleting or leaving unused the GallerySection.tsx file. Any navigation links in SiteHeader or SiteFooter pointing to the gallery section anchor should also be removed.
acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery section is no longer rendered on the landing page.
No broken anchor links to the gallery section remain in the header or footer navigation.
All other sections remain intact and unaffected.

nonGoals: Modifying any backend logic or data models.
Removing or modifying any other sections of the page.
